content.en:
"Okay, this is a secret technique that can be exchanged, you can choose one!"

A secret technique was presented in front of Ye Tian, and let Ye Tian choose one.

Great Dawn Secret Technique, you can explore the eighth sequence to Dao strange things, the difficulty of cultivation is extremely high, you need to comprehend the rules of the eighth sequence of sixty percent to the Dao, exchange requirements: 60,000 combat merits

The secret technique of the Great Ghost River, you can explore the eighth sequence to the strange things of the Dao, the difficulty of cultivation is easy, every time you lose the body, you only need to pay three into the eighth sequence to the Dao rules, exchange requirements: 30,000 combat merits

Infinite Ruins Divine Technique, you can explore the seventh sequence to Dao strange things, the cultivation difficulty is extremely high, you need to comprehend the seventh sequence to the Dao rules, exchange requirements: one million combat merits

There are a total of more than a dozen secret techniques here, and some of them are currently unaffordable for Ye Tian.

He thought about it carefully, and still chose the Great Ghost River Secret Technique.

Although he can cultivate the Great Dawn Secret Technique and meet the requirements, if the cultivation difficulty is extremely high, I am afraid that it will take a long time to practice, and the Great Ghost River Secret Technique is easy to practice, although it is flawed, but he can change and copy the body.

This kind of secret art suits him perfectly.

So, he chose the Great Ghost River Secret Technique.

"I choose to exchange for the Great Ghost River Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian said.

This fifth-fold Dao realm of Taisu Palace didn't say anything, and went through the exchange procedures for Ye Tian.

However, the Taisu War Hall naturally does not have the secret technique of the Great Ghost River, and it still needs to be obtained from the outside world and sent over, which will take time.

So, he needs to wait some days.

Therefore, Ye Tian prepared to wait for the Great Ghost River Secret Technique Inheritance to be sent in Taisu Battle City.

And just when Ye Tian had just left the Taisu Battle Palace, a figure appeared in front of him, and it was the master of Longqin Palace.

Ye Tian also knew the identity of the other party by copying his body.

"I've seen the Longqin Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Longqin Palace Lord smiled and said, "Are you interested in chatting?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian knew that his identity should have been exposed, otherwise a sixfold Dao realm peak powerhouse like the Longqin Palace Master would not come to him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian followed the Longqin Palace Master to an attic in Taisu Battle City.

It was silent, and there was no other Dao realm to disturb it.

At this time, the Longqin Palace Lord took out a wanted warrant for the Wuji Heavenly Palace: "Presumably you are the one wanted by the Wuji Heavenly Palace!"

"Yes, could it be that the Longqin Palace mainly grabbed me to invite the Wuji Heavenly Palace for a reward?"

Ye Tian smiled lightly.

He knew that Taisu Palace had a bad relationship with Wuji Heavenly Palace, and Wuji Heavenly Palace's actions this time made many forces extremely dissatisfied.

Therefore, he dared to expose himself and was not afraid to worry about his situation.

The Longqin Palace Lord shook his head, "Of course I won't do this, I'm just curious about why you, a mere Dual Supreme Dao Realm, can let the White Leaf Venerable of the Infinite Heavenly Palace want you." "

"Venerable White Leaves!"

Ye Tian only knew that Wuji Heavenly Palace wanted him, but he didn't know who wanted him.

Now it seems that it is this White Leaf Venerable.

"Is the Longqin Palace Master curious about the reason?" Ye Tian said lightly.

"It's okay if you don't say it!" said the Longqin Palace Master with a smile.

"It's very simple, I sabotaged Venerable Baiye's plan, so I was wanted by Wuji Heavenly Palace. Ye Tian said lightly.

"You're amazing. The Dragon Qin Palace Lord complimented: "Venerable Bai Ye can mobilize the Infinite Heavenly Pivot Ball of the Infinite Heavenly Palace, it stands to reason that it is impossible for you to evade the pursuit of the Infinite Heavenly Pivot Sphere, unless you have been hiding in the Origin Realm. Of course, it doesn't matter anymore. I want to recruit you on behalf of Taisu Palace, how about it?"

"Recruit me?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment.

I saw the Longqin Palace Master continue: "What we fancy is your potential and strength, you can obtain so many combat exploits, your true strength must be very strong, and I can sense the breath of the eighth sequence of supreme rules from you, and I can comprehend the eighth sequence of supreme rules in the realm of the double supreme realm, this is the first time I have encountered it." "

"I remember that Taisu Palace is a women's force, do you want me to join Taisu Guard?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Longqin Palace Master nodded.

"What benefits can I gain?" Ye Tian only cared about this.

The master of Longqin Palace said: "First of all, we can keep you from being discovered by Wuji Heavenly Palace, even if they are discovered, Taisu Palace can protect you." After all, it was only the White Leaf Venerable who you had offended, not the entire Infinite Heavenly Palace. In addition, after joining the Taisu Palace, you can gain more inheritance knowledge, which will be very helpful for you to impact the higher realms in the future. "

"Yes!" Ye Tian agreed.

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, the Longqin Palace Master was in a very good mood.

She recruited Ye Tian, just to see that Ye Tian's potential was very good, and in the future, she had the hope of becoming a sixfold supreme Dao realm or even a seventh-fold supreme Dao realm, in that case, she could greatly improve the strength of Taisu Palace and add a trace of the foundation to compete with Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Suddenly, Ye Tian asked again, "Longqin Palace Master, will the battlefield of the True Dao Domain be abandoned?"

The Longqin Palace Lord was silent for a moment and said, "I won't be given up for the time being!"

Temporarily!

That is to say, if you are really in a desperate situation, you will still be abandoned.

"To the Dao Void Demon, can't you get rid of it?" Ye Tian asked.

The Longqin Palace Lord smiled bitterly: "First, it is difficult to drive away, our strength is really not comparable to the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and even if we can really drive it away, the Wuji Heavenly Palace will not allow it to be driven away." In fact, we want to hold these supreme demons back and reduce the pressure on other battlefields as much as possible. "

"Other battlefields?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

He doesn't have a high level of contact, so he doesn't know the specific truth.

The Longqin Palace Lord continued: "The True Dao Domain is a third-level battlefield, this is the location chosen by the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and it is also a Heavenly Venerable of the Wuji Heavenly Palace who fled without a fight in the Luohe Fortress, which led to the Luohe Fortress being breached, so in order to forgive the sins, the Wuji Heavenly Palace turned the True Dao Domain into a third-level battlefield to attract a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons to come in, in that case, the other battlefields are equivalent to having fewer Supreme Dao Void Demons." "

"This ......"

Ye Tian was speechless, could he still be like this?

Wuji Heavenly Palace is too tricky, the key is that Wuji Heavenly Palace has nothing to lose.

The Longqin Palace Lord continued: "If we all withdraw, when the Dao Void Demon completely destroys the True Dao Domain, we will definitely retreat, and then the pressure on the other battlefields will definitely increase, and then the Wuji Heavenly Palace will be punished again." Therefore, the third-level battlefield of the True Dao Domain had to maintain a minimum of 10,000 years to the Dao Era, which was the minimum period. "

"Wuji Heavenly Palace is afraid of punishment, could it be that there is still a power beyond Wuji Heavenly Palace?" Ye Tian was very curious.

The Longqin Palace Lord didn't say, but said: "This is not something you can understand now, when you cultivate and ascend to my level, you will understand a little, but you can only understand a little, and if you don't reach the Sevenfold Dao Realm, a lot of information is not allowed to know." "

Ye Tian nodded, indicating that he understood.
